question: Use GradScaler to scale loss and unscale gradients. Check if gradients were skipped due to underflow.
template:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

model = nn.Linear(10, 1)
optimizer = torch.optim.SGD(model.parameters(), lr=1.0)
scaler = torch.cuda.amp.GradScaler()

x = torch.randn(1, 10)
y = torch.randn(1, 1)

with torch.cuda.amp.autocast():
    loss = model(x).mean()

scaled_loss = scaler.???(loss)
print(f"Scaled loss: {scaled_loss.item():.1f}")
